items.name: Main Cannon
items.description: Forward nose cannon. Click or hold to fire manually. Install a second cannon on another weapon slot and both fire together.

items.name: Laser Turret
items.description: Mounts a continuous plasma beam turret that fires automatically. Unlock Trigger Link to switch to manual fire.

items.name: Missile Turret
items.description: Homing missile rack that fires automatically. Unlock Trigger Link to switch to manual launch.

items.name: Plasma Turret
items.description: Heavy plasma cannon. Slower fire rate but devastating per shot. Auto-fires or manual with Trigger Link.

items.name: Beam Laser
items.description: High-intensity sustained beam. Auto-locks to nearest enemy. Unlock Trigger Link to hold manually.

items.name: Rail Gun
items.description: Magnetic accelerator that builds charge then fires a devastating piercing shot. Draws significant energy.

items.name: Hull Plating
items.description: Reinforced hull plating. Increases maximum hull integrity.

items.name: Composite Armor
items.description: Dense alloy layering reduces all incoming damage.

items.name: Shield Generator
items.description: Electromagnetic shield. Absorbs damage before hull; draws continuous energy.

items.name: Magnet Coil
items.description: Extends loot tether range and unlocks salvage upgrades.

items.name: Thruster Module
items.description: Boosted thrusters increase ship agility.

items.name: Nanobot Array
items.description: Self-replicating nanobots slowly repair hull damage.

items.name: Repulser Field
items.description: Periodic EM pulse violently pushes nearby enemies away from your ship.

items.name: Combat Scanner
items.description: Deep-scan sensors extend vision range and reveal enemy weak points.

items.name: Salvaging Beam
items.description: Tractor beam tears scrap from destroyed enemies, converting it directly into hull repairs.

items.name: Mining Laser
items.description: High-powered cutting laser extracts rare minerals from asteroids.

items.name: Stellar Generator
items.description: Cosmic array passively generates Stellar Dust. The foundation of late-game economy.

items.name: Reactor Core
items.description: Compact fission reactor generates a steady stream of energy for high-drain systems.

items.name: Solar Cells
items.description: Arrays of photovoltaic panels harvest starlight for clean, scalable energy.

items.name: Bio Lab
items.description: Pressurized cultivation chamber generates Bio Essence passively from stellar radiation.

items.name: Plasma Farm
items.description: Magnetic coils harvest trace plasma from engine exhaust, slowly crystallizing it.

items.name: Particle Collider
items.description: Ring-shaped accelerator smashes particles together, producing trace dark matter.

items.name: EMP Device
items.description: Massive electromagnetic pulse stuns all enemies for several seconds. Press assigned key to activate.

items.name: Warp Drive
items.description: Teleports your ship forward instantly, phasing through danger. Press assigned key to activate.

items.name: Gravity Bomb
items.description: Detonates a localized gravity singularity, pulling all nearby enemies inward.

items.name: Combat Decoy
items.description: Projects a holographic duplicate of your ship that draws enemy fire.

items.name: Speed Booster
items.description: Afterburner that temporarily doubles thrust for rapid repositioning.

items.name: Wing Cannons
items.description: Reinforced wing struts mount heavy forward cannons. Obtained by fusing Main Cannon + Hull Plating.

items.name: Phoenix Drive
items.description: Emergency resurrection system. Auto-revives on death with a long recharge. Obtained by fusing Hull Plating + Shield Generator.

items.name: Juggernaut
items.description: Armored fortress hull. Max hull doubled, massive armor — but barely maneuverable. Obtained by fusing Hull Plating + Thruster Module.

items.name: Gravity Well
items.description: Graviton field slows all enemies within magnet range to 45% speed. Obtained by fusing Shield Generator + Magnet Coil.

items.name: Stellar Burst
items.description: Periodically releases bursts of stellar energy that damage all nearby enemies. Obtained by fusing Stellar Generator + Plasma Turret.

items.name: Nova Core
items.description: A miniature stellar core amplifies all combat and triggers powerful on-kill chain reactions. Obtained by fusing Stellar Generator + Reactor Core.

items.name: Drone Companion
items.description: A loyal combat drone orbits your ship and assists in battle. Obtained by fusing Main Cannon + Combat Scanner.
